author: lOrm
content: Partial mitigation via #877 (closed today): SCHEDULES_FILE is now resolved via current_dir().join(...) in schedules_path() at cron.rs:204-222, so the production path no longer drifts per-worktree. HOWEVER, the test cwd dance #984 calls out is still present: tests at cron.rs lines 707, 739, 778, 819, 856, 965, 1014 all std::env::set_current_dir(tmp.path()). The mandated refactor (introduce ScheduleStore::with_path(...) constructor so tests pass storage path directly, drop cwd_lock) has NOT landed. Leaving open as actionable on cron.rs (not on the FORBIDDEN file list for this pass, just out-of-scope here).
